text:
edwin       2007-09-23 07:22:42 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    multimedia           Makefile 
  Added files:
    multimedia/openmovieeditor Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  [NEW PORT] multimedia/openmovieeditor: Simple non-linear movie editor
  
          Open Movie Editor is designed to be a simple video editor, that
          provides basic movie making capabilities. It aims to be powerful
          enough for the amateur movie artist, yet easy to use.
  
          WWW: http://openmovieeditor.sourceforge.net
  
  PR:             ports/116502
  Submitted by:   Dmitry Marakasov <amdmi3@amdmi3.ru>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.243     +1 -0      ports/multimedia/Makefile
  1.1       +42 -0     ports/multimedia/openmovieeditor/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/multimedia/openmovieeditor/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/multimedia/openmovieeditor/pkg-descr (new)
